description: Map Hadamard construction to spin-glass energy minimization. Each entry is an Ising spin. Energy is sum of squared row inner products. Ground state (E=0) is a Hadamard matrix. Parallel tempering with structured initialization.
mathematical_formalization: E(H) = sum_{r<s} (sum_k h_{rk}*h_{sk})^2. Ground state: E=0 iff Hadamard. Parallel tempering: K replicas at T_1 < ... < T_K with Metropolis swaps.
implementation_hypothesis: 32 replicas, T_k = 0.1 * 1.2^k. Single-spin-flip Glauber dynamics. O(668) per flip. 10^10 flips per replica.
experiment_seed: Parallel tempering on 668x668. Structured initialization. 24 hours, 32 cores. Track minimum energy and acceptance rates.
